title: pelargonium × hillianum
intro: Pelargonium × hillianum, also known as Rose Geranium or Barberton Daisy, is a hybrid plant species in the family Geraniaceae, derived from the cross of Pelargonium capitatum and Pelargonium linifolium. The leaves and flowers of this plant have been traditionally used for their medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Pelargonium × hillianum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and alleviating stress and anxiety. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils, can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
